'''O-Iris''' was a small, [[red]]-haired, [[Gender/Legends|female]] student at the [[Learning Circle]] on [[Kegan/Legends|Kegan]]. Young and shy, O-Iris obeyed her teachers and their lessons until [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Siri Tachi/Legends|Siri Tachi]] exposed the truth about [[The Learning]]'s falsehoods.<ref name="The Fight for Truth" />
